name: Mike Thompson
bio: With over 15 years of experience in the Yukon construction industry, Mike founded Yukon Handyman with a vision for premium craftsmanship and exceptional service.

name: Sarah Chen
bio: Sarah brings 10 years of project management experience, ensuring every job runs on schedule, on budget, and to the highest standards.

name: James Wilson
bio: James is a certified journeyman carpenter with expertise in custom millwork, cabinetry, and finish carpentry.

name: Alexandre Dubois
bio: Alex specializes in metal roofing and torch-on systems, with certifications from leading roof manufacturers.
